question: The scatter plot shows training hours vs test score. Which statement best describes the relationship between training hours and test score in the data?

options.A: Test scores tend to increase steadily as training hours rise.
options.B: Test scores tend to decrease as training hours increase.
options.C: There is little to no consistent relationship between training hours and test scores.
options.D: Participants with the most training hours achieve by far the highest test scores, as indicated by the largest and darkest points.

explanation: This scatter plot uses dual encoding: point position shows the relationship, but point size and color also encode the x-variable, making high values overly salient. That can tempt viewers to overstate the strength or form of the relationship.
